title: Nester Pod - Perch Free Vertical Bird Box for Wild Birds Sparrow and Blue Tit Bird House, Bird Houses for Garden Made from 100% Recycled Materials for Strength and Durability – Tuscan Green
features: A HAVEN FOR CAVITY NESTING BIRDS: The perch free, pod shaped bird box discourages competitive species while welcoming small to medium nesting birds to your urban or rural landscape. You’ll invite native species and promote biodiversity in your yard

SUSTAINABLY MADE: The modular Nester Pod green bird house is molded from 100% recycled HDPE (high density polyethylene) to stand up to years of sun and weather. The high strength shell also helps protect against unwanted visitors

6 ENTRY GUARDS: Customize the entrance of the bird nest box for the desired bird species by simply choosing from the 4 stainless steel entry guards included. Comes with 28mm, 32mm, 38mm, and 43mm sizes

REPLACEABLE INNER SHELL: The birdhouse insert with locking tab is a pressed wood cellulose fiber that creates a warm, insulative nesting cavity while helping to regulate humidity. Once the season is over, you can put the liner into your compost pile

THE PRODUCT OF YEARS OF TESTING AND NESTING: Created with the help of ornithologists, the Nester Pod nest boxes for wild birds are made for the health and comfort of cavity nesting birds like chickadees, blue tits, flycatchers, sparrows, and redstarts
